data.name: Tribal Favors
data.detailed_description:
Saphire has crashlanded on a savage planet. She is saved by a local tribe, but she's now endebted to them and has to work odd jobs in order to repay her debt to them.
She soon realises that the village itself is hardly populated by prudes and she herself soon feels her own body changing and acting against her own feelings.

Tribal Favors is a corruption adventure games where you have to work odd jobs to repay a debt with increasingly naughty scenes as your corruption level rises up. Manage your arousal and progress through quest as your character becomes more and more enticed to engage with the villagers.

You don't like Saphire's name? You can change it. In fact you can change even more than that!


Change your fur, hair, pattern, ears with any color you'd like to create the character you would like. More options will come as development goes on.

  • Multiple animated scene.

  • A story with quest and special events.

  • Arousal to manage to get access to naughty scenes.

  • A corruption level system to take things further and further.

  • A cute character than you can customize!

  • Play Minigames to earn money and corruption

  • 3D character and environment you can freely walk around.

data.short_description: Saphire has crashlanded on a savage planet. She is saved by a local tribe, but she's now endebted to them and has to work odd jobs in order to repay her debt to them.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit). or Linux (Steam OS)
  • 處理器: Any Dual-Core Processor (Intel or AMD)
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce MX150 / Vega 8 or better with 2GB of Graphics Memory
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit). or Linux (Steam OS)
  • 處理器: Any Dual-Core Processor (Intel or AMD)
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce MX150 / Vega 8 or better with 2GB of Graphics Memory
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
